paper_focus.title: Properties of Fe–Mn–Al alloys with different Mn contents using density functional theory
paper_focus.research_objective: To systematically determine the stability, electronic structures, elastic properties and Debye temperature of Fe–Mn–Al alloys using DFT, providing complete data for designing high-temperature structural and high-strength materials.
material_systems: B2 FeAl (ordered cubic structure, space group Pm-3m)
main_process_variables: Mn content variation from 0 to 1 in Fe1-xMnxAl
DFT calculation settings: GGA-PBE functional, ultrasoft pseudopotentials, plane-wave cutoff 450 eV, 8×8×8 k-point mesh
